name: Value of my case: chronic bronchitis from work mold?

mainEntity.name: Value of my case: chronic bronchitis from work mold?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**$50K-$200K+ via comp/settlement, based on impairment, lost work.**

Factors: permanency rating, future care[1]. Third-party boosts.

- Medical + wage loss.
- Disability percentage.
- Age, job impact.

Attorney calculates via experts. Varies by proof[1].
